<?php namespace Spatie\LaravelIgnition\FlareMiddleware; use Spatie\FlareClient\FlareMiddleware\FlareMiddleware; use Spatie\FlareClient\Report; use Spatie\LaravelIgnition\Recorders\JobRecorder\JobRecorder; class AddJobs implements FlareMiddleware { protected JobRecorder $jobRecorder; public function __construct() { $this->jobRecorder = app(JobRecorder::class); } public function handle(Report $report, $next) { if ($job = $this->jobRecorder->getJob()) { $report->group('job', $job); } return $next($report); } }
